# [LIMITED TIME] Switch to Reliable WordPress Hosting and Save 85%!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-11-30 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 347

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Have you ever wished you could switch to reliable WordPress
hosting? Wondering if there are any ongoing deals that are still
available?

If you missed the Black Friday Sale yesterday, no worries.

Several WordPress hosting companies are offering epic Small
Business Saturday deals 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tT3luiAiX0K8gZ2PFFOVMSxAnc2jZSxNeSjAaGsAPCU ) that you
might want to check out.

Remember… these hosting deals will expire soon.

If you want to set your website up for success in 2025, then NOW
is the right time to take advantage of these offers.

1. Save 85% OFF with SiteGround 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.yS4aNQtXLGMJFciEvFZtXCY4u5OmUKUYQykPHxlEpQw ) – I host most of my
websites, including WPBeginner, with SiteGround. All their
servers are hosted on Google Cloud Network + their plans come
with free SSL, free CDN, out of the box WordPress caching
solution, and a lot more.

Their lowest plan starts at $1.99 per month, and they are
offering a free site migration tool with all plans :)

2. Save 79% OFF with Hostinger 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.AZgijjKPoX1yPPb0wC2Hh8ow1gL80HgvEACzB9jM8kk ) – Hostinger is
officially recommended WordPress hosting by WordPress.org. They
offer reliable hosting for an unbelievably low price. All plans
come with WordPress acceleration features which really helps with
website speed.

The lowest plan starts at $1.95 per month, and it includes a free
domain, email, and SSL!

3. Save 80% OFF Bluehost ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..44SxbPoSH3lD9MV6W44zl_xWRXyAdt2L4AE6c1zBY-U )  – It is WordPress.org's longest running recommended host that
comes with 30-day money back guarantee. I use Bluehost for
hosting several of my small websites.

The lowest plan starts at $1.99 per month and offers a free
domain name and SSL.

4. Save 72% OFF With DreamHost 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.d4lE6DsYCTMbSRbluTa6xtOpPYjFe4kdobF5IoEhwjE ) – Another officially
recommended WordPress hosting provider by WordPress.org. Great
for small and medium-sized websites. They offer a free domain +
free SSL + automated WordPress site migration.

The lowest plan starts at $2.59 per month and offers a whopping
97-day money-back guarantee.

5. Save 81% OFF HostGator 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNzMyOTc1MTA3LCJuYmYiOjE3MzI5NzUxMDcsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI0ODg1ODUwIiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJubXE5MjYyY3Ixd2lpazNsNTJjOCIsInRva2VuIjoibm1xOTI2MmNyMXdpaWszbDUyYzgiLCJzZW5kX2F0IjoxNzMyOTc3MDAw
